title: butea listeri
intro: Butea listeri, also known as Dalbergia odorifera or Butea frondosa, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine. The medicinal properties of Butea listeri include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing, reducing fever, and alleviating pain. Butea listeri can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, making it accessible for those seeking its medicinal and health benefits.
